buckingham-dawn.text: Dawn Buckingham is a candidate for Texas Land Commissioner, running with Republican.
Dawn Buckingham is the incumbent in this race. Recorded background: Dawn Buckingham, incumbent land commissioner.
As of 2025-12-31, Dawn Buckingham's campaign had raised $1,258,999 in campaign receipts and spent $579,951, per Texas Ethics Commission filings (this filing period only, not a cycle-to-date total).

flores-benjamin.text: Benjamin Flores is a candidate for Texas Land Commissioner, running with Democratic.
Benjamin Flores's recorded background: Benjamin Flores, Bay City councilor (previously ran for governor).
As of 2026-02-21, Benjamin Flores's campaign had raised $2,885 in campaign receipts and spent $43,715, per Texas Ethics Commission filings (this filing period only, not a cycle-to-date total).

snider-neill.text: Neill Snider is a candidate for Texas Land Commissioner, running with Libertarian.
Neill Snider's recorded background: Neill Snider (Libertarian)
As of 2025-12-31, Neill Snider's campaign had raised $0 in campaign receipts and spent $3,750, per Texas Ethics Commission filings (this filing period only, not a cycle-to-date total).

base.summary: Texas Land Commissioner race: Dawn Buckingham, Benjamin Flores, Neill Snider. This overview lists each candidate's party, background, and campaign finance where available in our data set.
base.caveats: Our data set for this race covers candidate name, party, incumbency, background summary, and campaign finance totals where a filing was found (federal candidates file with the FEC; Texas state offices file with the Texas Ethics Commission -- each finance bullet names which). We do not have recorded voting histories or issue-by-issue policy positions for these candidates in this data set.
